SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2010 APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS DETAINED BY THE COURT. MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-24-2010 BY COMM. PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DORJE, NYIMA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EUROMOTORS, INC DBA MERCEDES-BENZ OF SAN FRANCISCO THE EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICEINT TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT'S ACTIONS WERE THE CAUSE OF THE ENGINE BREAKDOWN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
